mapper.select:
SELECT pr.id, pr.route_name, pr.product_id, pr.status, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at FROM process_route pr WHERE pr.is_delete = 0
AND pr.route_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{routeName}, '%')
AND pr.product_id = #{productId}
ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC

SELECT pr.id, pr.route_name, pr.product_id, pr.status, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at, ps.id AS stepId, ps.route_id, ps.step_code, ps.step_name, ps.workstation_id, ps.sort_order, ps.standard_time, ps.qc_required FROM process_route pr LEFT JOIN process_step ps ON pr.id = ps.route_id AND ps.is_delete = 0 WHERE pr.id = #{id} AND pr.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY ps.sort_order ASC

SELECT pr.id, pr.route_name, pr.product_id, pr.status, pr.created_at, pr.updated_at, ps.id AS stepId, ps.route_id, ps.step_code, ps.step_name, ps.workstation_id, ps.sort_order, ps.standard_time, ps.qc_required FROM process_route pr LEFT JOIN process_step ps ON pr.id = ps.route_id AND ps.is_delete = 0 WHERE pr.product_id = #{productId} AND pr.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY ps.sort_order ASC
